subcodes.first_line: O spiritual youth! Thy letter was received, expressing intense joy at the abundant love of the friends in Stuttgart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان روحانی نامه ات رسید اظهار فرط سرور از محبت موفور احبای استتگارت نموده
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @critique of Eastern values; culture, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
